results.rendered_html:
ajeya (3. a + jeya)
1〉 adj. f. ā unbesieglich  R. 4,10,32 . 5,8,18 .
— 2〉 n. ein besonderes Gegengift: pibedghṛtamajeyākhyamamṛtākhyaṃ ca  SUŚR. 2,250,17 . 256,11 ; vgl. ajita 2,a.

results.rendered_html:
ajeya a. [na. ta.] Not fit to be conquered.
— yaṃ A sort of medicinal preparation of ghee said to serve as an antidote; pibet ghṛtamajeyākhyaṃ Suś.
